testcase.name: US-009 AC-7.1: happy path — transcribes audio, writes cost_log > 5s WAV → Whisper mock → transcript returned + cost_log written
US-009 AC-7.2: oversize — > 25MB rejects before OpenAI call > Buffer > 25MB → BAD_REQUEST thrown · no OpenAI HTTP call
US-009 AC-7.3: timeout — Whisper API timeout → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR > nock delays 500ms · worker timeout=100ms → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
US-009 AC-7.4: rate-limit — 51st call per day → TOO_MANY_REQUESTS > Redis incr > 50 → TOO_MANY_REQUESTS with correct message
US-009 AC-7.4: rate-limit — 51st call per day → TOO_MANY_REQUESTS > 50th call (boundary) passes
US-009 AC-7.4: rate-limit — 51st call per day → TOO_MANY_REQUESTS > _todayKey format is correct
US-009 AC-7.5: API error — OpenAI 4xx/5xx → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR > OpenAI 500 error → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR thrown · no cost_log
US-009 AC-7.5: API error — OpenAI 4xx/5xx → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR > OpenAI 429 rate limit error → INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR thrown
